series_metadata.series_description: These files include banks that convert from a state charter, banks that did not open, and charter applications that were withdrawn or denied.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for five (5) years from date of being withdrawn, denied, or cancelled, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years from date of being withdrawn, denied, or cancelled, then destroy., Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
